markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on Sanity improvements, new tool builds, and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Sanity Overhaul:** GrowthX proposed Sanity improvements to cut article staging time from 40 to 5 minutes. Jon will connect GrowthX with Brex engineer Greg to scope the work.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [**New Tool Builds:** GrowthX scoped five new tools, including a "Charge Finder." Jon will connect GrowthX with Greg to unblock technical access and will find the owner of the merchant database.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
  - [**Aggressive SEO Strategy:** Brex is executing a "rip and replace" strategy to outrank competitors (Ramp, Mercury) for high-value commercial keywords like "corporate card."](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=2015.0)
  - [**Content Quality:** Jon is focused on creating unique, high-quality content by incorporating proprietary data, G2 quotes, and converting People Also Ask questions into full articles.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)

## Topics

### Sanity CMS Overhaul

  - [**Problem:** The Sanity workflow is inefficient, with article staging taking \~40 minutes.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [**GrowthX Proposal:** Reduce staging time to 5 minutes via:](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
      - [CTA library](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
      - [Consolidated page types](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
      - [Simplified main content area](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [**Other Issues:**](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
      - [**Slow Publishing:** Articles now take \>2 minutes to appear live, hindering post-publish review. This is a recent regression (last 45–60 days) likely from an engineering update.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
      - [**Drop Cap Bug:** A recurring bug affects formatting.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
      - [**Preview Mode:** Broken for some content types.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
      - [**Inconsistent Block Features:** The "Spend Trends" page type lacks a single-block feature present on older "journal" pages, forcing workarounds.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [**Path Forward:** Jon will connect GrowthX with Brex engineer Greg to scope the work.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)

### New Tool Builds

  - [**Context:** GrowthX scoped five tools Jon requested for RAMP.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
  - [**Timeline:** The first tool requires a 4-week max build, with subsequent tools being faster.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
  - [**Blockers:**](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
      - [**Access:** GrowthX engineer Kirkland needs access to the marketing site repo and Sanity. Jon will connect GrowthX with Greg to resolve this.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=890.0)
      - [**Data:** The "Charge Finder" tool requires a clean, accessible database of all merchants. Jon will find the owner of this data.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
  - [**Opportunity:** The Per Diem calculator could be built faster by duplicating the existing mileage reimbursement page.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)

### Content Strategy & SEO

  - [**Competitive Focus:** Brex is executing a "rip and replace" strategy to outrank competitors for high-value commercial keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=2015.0)
      - **Target:** Achieve \#1 rank for "corporate card" and "corporate cards" by EOM.
      - [**Competitors:** Directly targeting Ramp and Mercury Business Banking.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=2392.0)
  - [**Content Quality & Uniqueness:**](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
      - [**Proprietary Data:** Jon requested 20–30 proprietary stats from Yolanda's data team to incorporate into articles.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)
      - [**G2 Quotes:** Jon will add negative G2 quotes with links to create unique, non-AI-generatable content.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
      - [**Case Study Database:** GrowthX created a searchable database of 52 Brex case studies to help the team find unique angles and quotes.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)
  - [**Keyword Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=1817.0)
      - [**People Also Ask (PAA):** Convert PAA questions into full articles (\>800 words) to outrank competitors' FAQs.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=2103.0)
      - [**Small Business:** Target more small business keywords, as they often rank easier and drive high-quality leads.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=2501.0)
  - [**Brand & Partner Mentions:**](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=2012.0)
      - **Brex Card:** Use "Brex Corporate Card" or "Brex Corporate Cards" to support the \#1 ranking goal.
      - [**ZipHQ:** Mention in procurement content to maintain a reciprocal relationship.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=2222.0)
      - [**Navan:** Treat as a competitor in travel content.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=2251.0)
      - [**Ramp:** Mention only in targeted competitor articles (e.g., "Ramp Credit Card").](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=2362.0)

### Content Production Status

  - [**Staging:** Aida staged three articles.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)
      - [**FAQ Bug:** Adding new FAQs in Sanity requires publishing the article first, a known workflow issue.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
      - [**"Business Sweep":** Jon added a missing conclusion and extra content to match search intent.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)
  - [**Review:** Jon is reviewing two drafts:](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=1275.0)
      - [**"Burn Rate Analysis":** Ensuring no content conflict with an existing article.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)
      - [**"Best Software":** Editing for originality and to remove repetitive phrases.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [**Upcoming:** Five new drafts are ready for review tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=2748.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jon:**](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
      - [Connect GrowthX with Brex engineer Greg (email via Slack).](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
      - [Identify the owner of the merchant database for the "Charge Finder" tool.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
      - [Export Ahrefs position tracking CSV for the Google core update and share with Aida.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=1817.0)
      - [Review "Burn Rate Analysis" and "Best Software" drafts.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=1275.0)
      - [Publish "Business Sweep" article.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=1175.0)
      - [Scope Sanity improvements and new tool builds with Greg.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
      - [Send the latest case study database link to Jon.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)
      - [Stage new articles after Jon's review.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=2741.0)
      - [Deliver five new drafts tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/xS_t2Fazxf9tw8SsPLHYCNEzDZx_adNq?tab=summary&timestamp=2748.0)
